name: focs-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for FOCS submissions: foundations-venue fit, the April HotCRP deadline, the ten-page attention window, full-version submissions, double-blind hygiene, proof checkability, computer-assisted steps, the no-rebuttal review arc, IEEE proceedings camera-ready, and the arXiv/ECCC public record. Grounded in the official FOCS 2026 CFP, IEEE TCMF pages, and award records checked on 2026-07-08.
